# resetGateActivation

**Instance Property**

A parameter that defines the activation function to use with the reset-gate of the GRU operation.

## Declaration

```swift
var resetGateActivation: MPSGraphRNNActivation { get set }
```

## Discussion

Default value: `MPSGraphRNNActivationSigmoid`.
